data.name: Slime Girl: Sticky Love
data.detailed_description:
認識妮米亞

妮米亞是一位充滿好奇心的 史萊姆女孩，誕生於秘密洞穴的隱秘水域之中。她語調輕柔、身形流暢且不斷變化，對世界的理解與你截然不同。

她透過觸碰來學習。透過親近。透過你。

她的形體溫柔，氣息溫暖——但在表面之下，還蘊藏著更深層的奧秘。

起初只是靜水中的奇異邂逅，卻逐漸演變成更為親密的關係。

流動的浪漫

妮米亞不遵循規則。

她探索。她適應。她一點一點地靠近，直到距離本身開始消融。

你會堅守界線……還是任其軟化？

引導她的理解，或臣服於她創造的節奏。你的選擇將形塑她的成長、你們的連結，以及這段關係的發展軌跡。

動畫成人場景

隨著你們的羈絆加深，你將解鎖以沉浸式視覺片段呈現的 火辣動畫場景。

每個場景隨你們的關係演變，將熟悉的親密感與妮米亞流暢的本質交融——呈現柔和的透明感、變幻的形態與流動的動態。

解鎖的場景可隨時透過 互動式畫廊 觀看。

遊戲特色

  • 一款 以選擇驅動的成人視覺小說

  • 與妮米亞共度的獨特 怪獸少女戀愛故事

  • 隨著劇情解鎖的 火辣動畫場景

  • 著重 親密感、親近感與情感連結

  • 由你的選擇所決定的 多種結局

  • 輕巧的 迷你遊戲 增添遊戲體驗的變化

  • 隸屬於 天鵝絨迷宮宇宙

你會逐漸靠近嗎？

妮米亞溫柔而好奇，總是想再多探尋一點點。

她不會強行掌控。

她邀請你放手。

問題很簡單。

你會緊握自己……還是讓自己被擁抱？

*****

From the Black Codex of the Night Abbey, copied in a trembling hand and bound in cracked leather:

In the final age of the elder world, it is written that the protagonist shall arise from the mass of lost souls, an exile seeking the original code that once governed the divinity of man. This life is but a simulation, a visual fiction drawn in the scarlet ink of a psychological crisis. Long ago, the world was beautiful, a journey through a colorful paradise before the great apocalypse brought the fall of the elder gods. Now, the path is dark, and the narration of our history is a surreal tale of war and mystery.

I have traveled to the island where the black nexus of reality begins to fray, a place where the atmosphere is thick with the scent of old magic. Here, the maiden of the goo waits in her lair, her being a fresh alchemy of desire and shadow. To gaze upon her is to enter an interactive drama of the spirit, a narrative where every choices lead to a different confession under the midnight sky. She is the princess of the deep, a female monster whose nudity is a sacred artifact, and her love is a treasure that carries the weight of a final conquest.

In the depths of a medieval manor, I found a dwarf working in a stylised atelier, forging a ring to bind the werewolves and the dragon. Beside him sat two cats with eyes of fire and a dog that guarded the gate to the dungeon. They spoke in a low conversation of the lore of the ark, of how the orc and the elf once lived in a league of peace before the greed of the vampire queen poisoned the earth. It is a story based on the mythology of the scarlet emblem, a fiction where the fighter and the goblin dance to the same rhythm of the beats.

Do not be deceived by the casual appearance of the bunny girl or the cute character who offers a relaxing massage in the cloud manor. Their affection is a seduction, a wholesome mask for the mature desires that pulse in the vein of the world. In this adult novel of the flesh, the sex and the passion are but seeds of a deeper sin. We are all acting in a stylized simulation, seeking a soft romance in a nest of demons. Even the funny ghost of the abbey whispers of the soul, a secret kept hidden by the raven of the night.

I remember the lessons of nadia, who told of the rich matter that makes up our dreams. She spoke of the rancher who harvests the souls of the innocent, and the emotional crisis of a woman lost in a visual adventure. The world is open, yet we are trapped in a drama of our own making, a psychological hunt for a love that feels like an elden dream. Every massage of the hand is a rhythm, every beats of the heart a step toward the final endings of our story.

The atmosphere of the abbey is heavy with the smell of old parchment and the magic of a lost age. We seek the divinity in the goo, the sticky affection of a being who knows our deepest secrets. It is a mystery that transcends the gray wild, a supernatural romance that defies the laws of the elder world. As we craft our own destiny, we must remember that the content of our life is a mass of choices, a narrative of the dragon and the maiden that never truly ends.

Hearken to the narration of the codex, for the dragon has returned to the scarlet lair and the orc prepares for the final war. The elf and the dwarf have fled to the island of the lost, leaving only the exile to face the trials of the gate. We seek the treasure of the maiden, a beautiful being of goo who offers a fresh confession of love. In the midnight hour, the passion of the succubus will be revealed, a tale of the horny and the holy.

Thus ends the edition of this scroll: heed the warnings, for in this realm pleasure and punish walk hand in hand, and every secret path leads, sooner or later, to the same dark gate.

data.short_description: 與好奇的史萊姆少女妮米亞一同墜入深淵。這是一款成人怪物少女視覺小說，擁有火辣的動畫場景、流暢的親密互動，以及由你的選擇所塑造的浪漫故事。
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • 處理器: Intel(R) Core(TM) i7-9750H CPU @ 2.60GHz 2.59 GHz
  • 記憶體: 12 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1660 Ti
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • 處理器: Intel Core i7-10750H @ 2.60GHz
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 2060 Ti
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Slime Girl: Sticky Love
data.detailed_description:
Meet Nimea

Nimea is a curious slime girl born from the hidden waters of the secret cave. Soft-spoken, fluid, and ever-changing, she does not understand the world the way you do.

She learns through touch. Through closeness. Through you.

Her form is gentle, her presence warm - but there is something deeper beneath the surface.

What begins as a strange encounter in the still waters slowly becomes something far more intimate.

A Fluid Romance

Nimea does not follow rules.

She explores. She adapts. She draws closer, little by little, until distance itself begins to fade.

Will you keep your boundaries… or let them soften?

Guide her understanding or surrender to the rhythm she creates. Your choices shape her growth, your connection, and the path your relationship takes.

Animated Adult Scenes

As your bond deepens, you unlock spicy animated scenes presented as immersive visual moments.

Each scene evolves with your relationship, blending familiar intimacy with Nimea’s fluid nature - featuring soft transparency, shifting form, and flowing motion.

Unlocked scenes can be viewed anytime through the interactive gallery.

What to Expect

  • A choice-driven adult visual novel

  • A unique monster girl romance with Nimea

  • Spicy animated scenes unlocked through the story

  • A focus on intimacy, closeness, and emotional connection

  • Multiple endings shaped by your choices

  • Light minigames to vary the experience

  • Part of the Velvet Labyrinth universe

Will You Drift Closer?

Nimea is gentle. Curious. Always reaching just a little further.

She does not take control.

She invites you to let go.

The question is simple.

Will you hold onto yourself… or let yourself be held?



*****

From the Black Codex of the Night Abbey, copied in a trembling hand and bound in cracked leather:

In the final age of the elder world, it is written that the protagonist shall arise from the mass of lost souls, an exile seeking the original code that once governed the divinity of man. Beside him sat two cats with eyes of fire and a dog that guarded the gate to the dungeon. They spoke in a low conversation of the lore of the ark, of how the orc and the elf once lived in a league of peace before the greed of the vampire queen poisoned the earth. It is a story based on the mythology of the scarlet emblem, a fiction where the fighter and the goblin dance to the same rhythm of the beats.

Do not be deceived by the casual appearance of the bunny girl or the cute character who offers a relaxing massage in the cloud manor. Their affection is a seduction, a wholesome mask for the mature desires that pulse in the vein of the world. In this adult novel of the flesh, the sex and the passion are but seeds of a deeper sin.
